inflation.label: broadening / underlying
inflation.note: A Middle East energy shock atop earlier tariffs is bleeding into broad price increases, with about half of categories up 3%+ and some inflation expectations rising.
inflation.quote: Also concerning is how broad price increases have been lately. About half of the categories of goods and services prices tracked in consumer inflation have been up 3 percent or more this year

labor.label: stable / balanced
labor.note: He judges labor supply and demand to have come into rough balance with unemployment steady at 4.3%, no longer the dominant policy driver.
labor.quote: recent data has indicated to me that labor supply and demand have finally come into a rough balance

stance.label: somewhat/modestly restrictive
stance.note: He favors removing easing-bias language and holding at the current restrictive setting, prepared to hike if expectations unanchor.
stance.quote: I am prepared to be patient in holding policy at its current restrictive setting as we watch how the conflict evolves
